$msgId..validate: newData.hasChildren(['receiverId', 'senderId', 'message', 'timestamp', 'seen']) && newData.child('senderId').isString() && newData.child('receiverId').isString() && newData.child('message').isString() && newData.child('timestamp').isString() && newData.child('seen').isBoolean()
$msgId..write: auth != null && ((!data.exists() && newData.child('senderId').val() === auth.uid) || (data.exists() && data.child('receiverId').val() === auth.uid && newData.child('senderId').val() === data.child('senderId').val() && newData.child('receiverId').val() === data.child('receiverId').val() && newData.child('message').val() === data.child('message').val() && newData.child('timestamp').val() === data.child('timestamp').val() && newData.child('seen').isBoolean()))
